app.accountLoadFailedTitle: We could not load your NextClaw Account right now.
app.accountLoadFailedDescription: Sign in again to refresh your account session and continue with NextClaw Web.

routeDescriptions.instances: Open your remote instances, review quota usage, and continue work from the web.
routeDescriptions.skills: Manage the marketplace visibility and lifecycle of the skills you published.
routeDescriptions.account: Manage your username, publishing scope, and account readiness in one place.

account.title: NextClaw Account
account.description: This keeps your publishing identity, username readiness, and the canonical NextClaw Web account entry in one place.
account.highlightDescription: You are on the exact account settings page that publish errors should point to. Set your username here before publishing personal skills.
account.publishScopeMissing: Set a username to unlock @username/* publishing
account.missingTitle: Set your username before publishing personal skills
account.missingDescription: Your account is already signed in, but personal marketplace publishing stays blocked until this username is set. The canonical page is https://platform.nextclaw.io/account, and the CLI fallback is `nextclaw account set-username <username>`.
account.readyDescription: Your personal skills now publish under {scope}.
account.lockedHelp: This version supports initial username setup only. Renaming is not available yet.

messages.usernameSaved: Username saved. Your personal publish scope is now ready.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.description: Manage the skills you published under your own scope. Admin review status and your marketplace visibility stay separate here.
skills.searchPlaceholder: Search by package name or title

metrics.totalHint: All non-deleted skills under your scope.
metrics.hiddenHint: Still kept, but removed from public listing.

actions.manageDescription: Hide removes this skill from the public marketplace without touching the admin review result. Delete removes it from your default management list.

messages.empty: No skills under your scope yet. Publish one first, then manage it here.
messages.selectOne: Select a skill from the left to review its current state.
messages.deleteConfirm: Delete this skill from your marketplace management list? The marketplace entry will be removed immediately.

login.heroTitle: Sign in to NextClaw Web and continue your instances and agent workflows.
login.heroDescription: One NextClaw Account brings together web access, remote entry, and future collaboration features in a single experience. Once you sign in, your instances, shares, and account capabilities all meet here.

password.title: One account across every entry point
password.description: Desktop, web, and future account capabilities all use the same NextClaw Account, so you do not have to manage separate identities.

register.title: Open your instances from the browser
register.description: After signing in, you can review your instances, open a workspace remotely, and continue the agent flow already running on it.

instance.title: Share access with clear control
instance.description: When collaboration is needed, create revocable share links for specific instances without exposing your primary account.

login.label: Login
login.title: Email + password
login.subtitle: Use your existing NextClaw Account password to sign in. Register and password reset are available in the other tabs.

register.label: Sign up
register.title: Verify email, then set password
register.subtitle: New accounts must verify email ownership with a code before setting a password.

reset_password.label: Reset
reset_password.title: Reset password after verification
reset_password.subtitle: We verify email ownership first, then allow you to set a new password.

remote.title: My Instances
remote.description: After you sign in on desktop and enable remote access, your instances appear here. You can open them directly in the browser or create revocable share links for others.

messages.empty: No instances yet. Go back to the desktop app, sign in, and enable remote access first.
messages.shareCopyManual: Copy failed. Please copy the link manually.
messages.newShareCopied: New share link copied to clipboard.
messages.newShareCreated: New share link created. Please copy it manually.
messages.shareRevoked: Share link revoked. Existing shared sessions will stop working immediately.
messages.noShares: No share links for this instance yet.
messages.archiveSuccess: Instance archived. It is now hidden from the main list.
messages.restoreSuccess: Instance restored to the main list.
messages.archiveConfirm: Archive this instance and hide it from the main list?
messages.deleteConfirm: Delete this archived instance permanently? This also removes its saved share links and session history.

archived.title: Archived instances
archived.description: Archived instances stay out of the main list until you restore or delete them.

sharePanel.title: Share links
sharePanel.description: Once revoked, already-open shared sessions stop working immediately.

quota.title: Remote Quota & Usage
quota.description: This shows today's remote quota consumption so you can quickly tell whether the limit is session rate, daily budget, or active connections.

billing.title: Usage & Billing
billing.description: This module is still being prepared. For now, the platform homepage stays focused on instance access and sharing.

share.title: Opening shared instance
share.description: Each open of a share link creates a new access session. Refreshing this page creates a fresh session and continues the redirect.
share.loading: Validating share link and creating access session...
